description: Phase 2: Duplicate detection across the full OneDrive tree. Groups by (name, size) — cheap heuristic, does not require downloading content.

inputs.min_size: Ignore files smaller than N bytes (default 1024)

steps.note: Returns groups[] with {name, size, copies, instances[]}

AGENT: Build markdown table of top duplicate groups by (copies DESC, size DESC). Show: name, size, copies, total wasted bytes per group. Summarize estimated_wasted_bytes in GB. Add a 'recommended actions' section (keep newest? manual review?).
